children.name: firefox
history\allVideos.spec.js
History — All Videos
@smoke @P2 TC-H03 — All Videos tab displays a video count greater than zero
@P2 TC-H03 — All Videos tab shows videos from multiple different users
@P2 TC-H04 — First video card contains a cookie ID
@P3 TC-H05 — Refresh button reloads video list without full page navigation
history\cookiePersistence.spec.js
History — Cookie Persistence
@P1 TC-H06 — Cookie UUID is assigned on first visit
@P1 TC-H06 — UUID in debug panel matches the browser cookie value
@P2 TC-H07 — Clearing cookies results in a new UUID on revisit
@P2 TC-H07 — After cookie clear, Your Videos tab shows empty state
history\yourVideos.spec.js
History — Your Videos
@smoke @P1 TC-H02 — Empty state is shown for a new user with no videos
@P1 TC-H01 — Your Videos tab shows only videos matching the current user cookie
navigation\navigation.spec.js
Navigation — Header Links
@smoke @P2 TC-N01 — All three nav links are visible in the header
@P2 TC-N01 — Clicking Stock Footage nav loads the Stock Footage Generator page
@P2 TC-N01 — Clicking History nav loads the History page
@P2 TC-N01 — Clicking Studio nav returns to the Studio page
@P2 TC-N01 — App logo/title link returns to Studio from any page
@P3 TC-N02 — Navigation does not cause full page reload (SPA routing)
stockFootage\generationSettings.spec.js
Stock Footage — Generation Settings
@P2 TC-SF04 — High Quality warning is shown when toggle is enabled
@P2 TC-SF04 — High Quality warning disappears when toggle is disabled
@P2 TC-SF03 — Settings applied: 4s-landscape-standard
@P2 TC-SF03 — Settings applied: 8s-portrait-standard
@P2 TC-SF03 — Settings applied: 12s-portrait-hq
stockFootage\scriptParsing.spec.js
Stock Footage — Script Parsing
@smoke @P1 TC-SF01 — Stock Footage page loads with correct heading
@P1 TC-SF01 — Script textarea accepts multi-scene screenplay content
@P1 TC-SF01 — Parse Script button is visible and enabled when script is present
@P1 TC-SF05a — Empty script: Parse Script button is disabled
@P1 TC-SF05b — Empty script: submitting shows validation feedback
studio\aspectRatio.spec.js
Studio — Aspect Ratio
@P2 TC-S06 — Default aspect ratio is Landscape
@P2 TC-S06 — Can switch to Portrait
@P2 TC-S06 — Can switch back to Landscape from Portrait
studio\highQuality.spec.js
Studio — High Quality Mode
@P2 TC-S07 — HQ toggle is present and defaults to off
@P2 TC-S07 — HQ toggle can be enabled
@P2 TC-S07 — HQ toggle can be disabled after enabling
studio\prompt.spec.js
Studio — Direct Prompt
@smoke @P1 TC-S01 — Studio page loads with correct heading
@P1 TC-S01 — Prompt textarea accepts input and generate button is present
@P1 TC-S01 — Generate button label reflects default video count of 3
@P1 TC-S08a — Empty prompt: generate button is disabled
@P1 TC-S08b — Empty prompt: submitting shows user-facing validation feedback
studio\videoCount.spec.js
Studio — Video Count
@P1 TC-S03 — Count 1 (minimum (1)) updates generate button label
@P1 TC-S03 — Count 3 (default (3)) updates generate button label
@P1 TC-S03 — Count 5 (maximum (5)) updates generate button label
@P2 TC-S04 — Value 0 is rejected or clamped to minimum
@P2 TC-S04 — Value 6 is rejected or clamped to maximum
webkit
